name: repo-contract-enforcer-diagnostics
description: Inline diagnostics from repo_contract_enforcer rules (team patterns).

commands.title: Repo Contract Enforcer: Show Run History
Repo Contract Enforcer: Open Rule Documentation

repoContractEnforcer.runOnSave.description: Run checks automatically when Rust/TOML files are saved

repoContractEnforcer.runOnStartup.description: Run one initial check when the workspace is opened

repoContractEnforcer.runOnChange.description: Run checks while editing Rust/TOML files (debounced)

repoContractEnforcer.runOnFileEvents.description: Run checks on Rust/TOML file create/change/delete/rename events

repoContractEnforcer.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for edit/file-event triggered checks

repoContractEnforcer.workspaceFolderStra.description: Select which workspace folders are checked in multi-root workspaces

repoContractEnforcer.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns (relative to each checked workspace root) excluded from diagnostics; plain tokens (e.g. target) are treated as folder names

repoContractEnforcer.docsPathDefault.description: Workspace-relative path to the default rule documentation opened by code actions

repoContractEnforcer.docsPathStructure.description: Workspace-relative path to the manifest/structure rule documentation opened by code actions

repoContractEnforcer.runTimeoutMs.description: Maximum runtime for one check process before forced interruption

repoContractEnforcer.command.description: Command used to invoke cargo (or an equivalent build tool) for the backend check process

repoContractEnforcer.args.description: Arguments passed to repoContractEnforcer.command when launching the backend check process

repoContractEnforcer.outputChannelEnable.description: Enable verbose stdout/stderr logging in the extension output channel

repoContractEnforcer.runHistorySize.description: Maximum number of recent run summaries retained in memory for the run history command

repoContractEnforcer.statusBarMessagePol.description: Control transient status-bar notifications (all checks, errors only, or none)
